article_title: Operation PowerOFF Seizes 53 DDoS-for-Hire Domains and Warns 75,000 Users in Largest Coordinated Takedown of Booter Services

content_preview.title: Operation PowerOFF Seizes 53 DDoS-for-Hire Domains and Warns 75,000 Users in Largest Coordinated Takedown of Booter Services
content_preview.summary: A 21-country law enforcement coalition dismantled dozens of DDoS-for-hire platforms and sent deterrence warnings to tens of thousands of identified users.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Law enforcement agencies from 21 countries conducted a coordinated enforcement week against distributed denial-of-service (DDoS)-for-hire platforms, seizing 53 domains, arresting four suspects, and sending more than 75,000 warning emails and letters to identified users of the services, according to [BleepingComputer](https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/operation-poweroff-identifies-75k-ddos-users-takes-down-53-domains/). The operation, dubbed PowerOFF and coordinated by E...

editor_notes.content_quality: Strong infosec/law enforcement article on Operation PowerOFF.
editor_notes.source_verification: Sources captured (BleepingComputer, TechCrunch, CyberScoop). Europol-coordinated 21-country action, 53 domains seized, 4 arrests, 75000 user warnings, 3M+ accounts recovered, prevention strategy from captured snapshots.
